title: Chat Wave 1B - Tool Proxy Runtime
notes: Repo-native staging shard for tool proxy and bounded runtime candidates from chat wave 1.
mcp-gateway-proxy has landed as AOA-T-0065 while preflight-reputation-check now stays narrowing-only on the first pass.
First pass is registry-first and does not create seed bundles.
lifecycle-managed-tool-proxy and isolated-stateful-agent-runtime are now explicit exclusions rather than staged candidates.
Landed lifecycle and confirmation-boundary techniques remain authoritative.
